description: Basic mobile-first website with up to 5 sections, WhatsApp/call buttons, basic SEO and a lead-capture form.
Monthly local SEO package covering Google Business Profile setup, citation building, review management and content posting.
Facebook/Instagram ad management with creative design, audience targeting, WhatsApp/lead-form integration and weekly performance reporting.
Automation of enquiries, follow-ups and reports via Google Sheets/CRM, email/WhatsApp alerts and a basic chatbot.
Full WhatsApp customer-relationship system: auto-replies, multi-stage follow-ups, broadcast planning and lead status tracking.
Visual identity package that includes logo refinement, color/font system, social media templates and menu/brochure designs.
Monthly content creation for posts and reels, captions, hashtags and festival-campaign creatives.
Video support covering thumbnail design, Shorts planning, basic video SEO and livestream setup.
Single-page landing site focused on conversions, with WhatsApp CTA and basic SEO.
Entry-level package for small businesses needing a simple website and basic SEO.
Mid-range package covering a website, local SEO and basic ad management.
Comprehensive growth system with website, SEO, paid ads and WhatsApp CRM.
Full-scale digital transformation for high-growth businesses, custom-built to scale.
Google Business Profile, review requests, local citations and weekly posts for shops/hotels.
Meta ads, landing page or lead form, WhatsApp follow-up flow and lead tracking spreadsheet.
All-in-one package: website, SEO, ads, social content, WhatsApp CRM and monthly reporting.
